name: French-Vietnamese Cuisine, Springrolls
recipeInstructions:
Boil the rice stick noodles for 3 minutes and then place in a strainer to drain. Keep the water boiling.
Saute chicken breast in a pan with soy sauce to taste until cooked. Cut into long strips and set aside.
Boil shrimp for 1 minute, peel skin off, and cut into halves. Cut Romaine lettuce into thin long strips. Peel cucumber and place about 16 long strips on the side.
Dip 2 pieces of rice paper into boiling water, then lay flat next to each other on a cloth napkin. In a row, place 3 halves of shrimp (pink side down) in the middle of each rice paper.
Place some rice noodles on top of the shrimp. Add 2-3 strips of chicken on top of the noodles. Continue with more rice noodles.
Cover with peeled cucumber and Romaine lettuce strips. Place mint and cilantro leaves face down on the rice paper in front of the shrimp and noodles.
Fold the sides of the rice paper and tightly roll to form springrolls. Cut into 6 pieces or keep as longer pieces. Serve with peanut sauce on the side.
